wine_retailers.name: Millesima Italy
wine_retailers.description: European bonded merchant with strong Tuscan en-primeur allocations including Sassicaia, Ornellaia, Masseto, Tignanello and Solaia. Walk-in retail in Milan with home delivery across Italy.
wine_retailers.speciality: Bolgheri and Super Tuscan en-primeur, Brunello back-vintages, international shipping

wine_retailers.name: Obsequium
wine_retailers.description: Long-running Oltrarno wine merchant with a deep Tuscan focus, stocking 2,500 references including back-vintages of Sassicaia, Ornellaia and Brunello di Montalcino in the temperature-controlled cellar.
wine_retailers.speciality: Bolgheri Super Tuscans, Brunello library, Chianti Classico Gran Selezione, Vin Santo

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Alessi
wine_retailers.description: Family-run since 1952 near the Duomo, with a 1,800-bottle inventory across Italian and international regions. The Tuscan section anchors the shop including grower Chianti Classico and back-vintage Brunello.
wine_retailers.speciality: Tuscan classics, sweet wines, Vin Santo, library Brunello, regional grappa

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Vanni
wine_retailers.description: Lucca's flagship caviste established 1965 with 3,500 references across Tuscany and international labels. Specialist in Tuscan back-vintages including Sassicaia and Masseto, plus a strong sweet wine cellar.
wine_retailers.speciality: Tuscan back-vintages, Bolgheri, Vin Santo, international classics, regional grappa and Vermouth di Torino

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Casa del Vino Siena
wine_retailers.description: Tuscan-anchored caviste near Piazza del Campo, stocking grower Chianti Classico, Brunello di Montalcino, Vino Nobile di Montepulciano and Bolgheri reds across multiple vintages.
wine_retailers.speciality: Chianti Classico grower roster, Brunello vintages, Vernaccia di San Gimignano, Tuscan grappa

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Tognoni Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: Retail arm of the historic Bolgheri wine bar Enoteca Tognoni, stocking the full Bolgheri DOC producer roster including Sassicaia, Ornellaia, Masseto, Grattamacco and Le Macchiole.
wine_retailers.speciality: Bolgheri DOC complete roster, Sassicaia library, Tuscan IGT Super Tuscan

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca di Piazza Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: Five-shop family-run retail operation in Montalcino, stocking around 800 labels from across the consortium. Includes Brunello di Montalcino verticals from producers like Biondi-Santi, Soldera and Casanova di Neri.
wine_retailers.speciality: Brunello di Montalcino full consortium roster, Rosso di Montalcino, Moscadello di Montalcino

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Marilu
wine_retailers.description: Natural wine bar and shop in San Miniato run by sommelier Marco Lami and cookbook author Emiko Davies. Stocks 200+ organic and biodynamic labels from artisan producers across Tuscany and Italy.
wine_retailers.speciality: Natural wine, biodynamic Tuscan producers, organic Italian regional wines, small-grower IGT
